baselines.notes: Current Ada FP32 GEMM winner for SM89 GPUs.

Promote 128x128x64 async WMMA square lane after zero-diff 512^3 correctness and 148.394 TFLOPS steady-state on H100. This is the best cheap shave on the ~1 ms class, but it still sits far from the cuBLASLt ceiling, so the main gap-close path now belongs to the Hopper-native WGMMA/TMA lane.
Generic CUDA GEMM baseline when no architecture-specific winner exists.
